mapper.select: SELECT user_id, email, password, nickname, gender, birth_year, profile_image_url, status FROM users WHERE email = #{email} AND status = 'ACTIVE'
SELECT allow_push_chat, allow_push_social FROM users WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'ACTIVE'
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET allow_push_chat = #{allowPushChat}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'ACTIVE'
UPDATE users SET allow_push_social = #{allowPushSocial}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'ACTIVE'
mapper.select: SELECT g.group_id, g.group_name, g.group_image_url, gm.group_nickname FROM group_members gm JOIN user_groups g ON gm.group_id = g.group_id WHERE gm.user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET password = #{newPassword}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE users SET profile_image_url = #{profileImageUrl}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE users SET status = 'DELETED', updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
